note: Canonical MERGED V1∪V2a membership snapshot for Sale V2b recognition. root MUST equal the V1_MEMBER_ROOT baked into the deployed Sale V2b (0x507E9c9C365a865F2A2b94DA9E12ccCC2bBeB88b).
